news.summary: Algorithmic trading strategies, commonly used in cryptocurrency trading, offer automation and efficiency. Strategies like trend following, arbitrage, market making, and mean reversion allow traders to react to price movements swiftly and handle large volumes. Execution algorithms, such as TWAP (time-weighted average price) and VWAP (volume-weighted average price), focus on discreetly entering or exiting positions. TWAP splits large orders evenly over time, ideal for quiet trades in low-liquidity markets, while VWAP factors in volume traded at each price to provide a more accurate average reflecting market value. Calculating TWAP and VWAP involves summing up prices at regular intervals and dividing by the number of intervals, but VWAP also considers trading volume. TWAP is suited for steady trades and quiet markets, while VWAP is useful for benchmarking against market activity. Real-world examples include a $250-million Bitcoin purchase by Strategy using TWAP to minimize slippage and a crypto VC firm's improved execution using TWAP for Instadapp. Kraken Pro incorporates VWAP as a technical indicator for precise and informed crypto trading decisions. Understanding the differences and applications of TWAP and VWAP can provide traders an edge in the cryptocurrency market.
news.headline: Explore differences between TWAP (ignores volume) and VWAP (considers volume) in crypto trading for better execution strategies.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Stamford, Connecticut, Star Group, L.P. revealed an increase in its quarterly distribution for the period ending March 31, 2025. The distribution surged to $0.1850 per common unit, up from $0.1725 per common unit. Annually, this marks a $0.05 increase to $0.74 per unit. This uptick signifies the 13th consecutive year of annual dividend growth for the company, a renowned home energy distributor and services provider trading on the NYSE under the ticker symbol SGU.
news.headline: Star Group, L.P. raises quarterly distribution to $0.1850 per unit, annual distribution up by 5 cents to $0.74 per unit.

news.summary: Today, there was negative news from UnitedHealth regarding a disappointing report and bleak 2025 outlook, which had a negative impact on the stock market. As a result, the Dow Jones Industrial Average decreased by 600 points. This sudden drop in the market was further highlighted in a live coverage discussing the significant sell-off of UnitedHealth shares and the breakout of an Indian bank from its base.
news.headline: UnitedHealth's poor report leads to Dow Jones dropping 600 points, impacting stock market today. Indian bank also sees growth.

news.summary: Rio Tinto Plc (NYSE: RIO) has announced a collaboration with AMG Metals & Materials to potentially create a significant, environmentally-friendly aluminium project in India. The aim is to utilize renewable energy like wind and solar, along with pumped hydro storage, to run the plant. The partnership will evaluate the possibility of constructing a combined facility capable of producing up to 1 million tonnes per year (Mtpa) of primary aluminium and 2 Mtpa of alumina. The initial phase of the exploration will concentrate on... Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Rio Tinto teams up with AMG Metals & Materials for a green aluminium project in India. The project aims to use renewable energy and has a capacity for up to 1M tonnes per annum of primary aluminium and 2M tonnes per annum of alumina.

news.summary: Treeverse, a role-playing game running on Immutable's zkEVM technology, will be initiating play-to-airdrop rewards related to the END token soon. The rewards are set to commence starting April 19th.
news.headline: 'Immutable's Treeverse rolls out 1st rewards season for END token on April 19 in zkEVM RPG game.'

news.summary: Express Elevator recently completed the acquisition of Ascend Elevator on April 4, 2025, based in Brown Deer, Wisconsin. This move signifies a significant step forward in Express Elevator's expansion plans as it takes over the operations of the independent elevator service provider. The acquisition represents a strategic decision to enhance Express Elevator's market presence and service offerings. This development marks a notable achievement for Express Elevator and underscores its commitment to growth in the industry.
news.headline: Express Elevator acquires Ascend Elevator, expanding in Wisconsin. Acquisition completed on April 4, 2025.

news.summary: Coinbase Global Inc (NASDAQ: COIN) released a warning about a potential "crypto winter," as it gears up to report its Q1 earnings on May 8. The company started the year with strong momentum after positive remarks on crypto by the Trump administration but now faces challenges due to "sharply rising macro concerns," per Rosenblatt Securities. Analyst Chris Brendler has maintained a Buy rating for Coinbase Global but has revised the price target from $305 to $290. Q1 estimates have been adjusted downwards to account for a continued decrease in trading activity. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Coinbase Global warns of "crypto winter", Analyst lowers Q1 estimates; target reduced to $290 from $305.

news.summary: Bitcoin mining company Bit Digital has diversified its business strategy by acquiring an industrial building in Madison, North Carolina for $53.2 million through its Canadian subsidiary Enovum Data Centers Corp. The transaction includes a $2.25 million initial deposit, $1.2 million non-refundable. The acquisition was disclosed in a Form 8-K filed with the SEC and is expected to close on May 15. Bit Digital has also announced a new Tier 3 data center in Quebec, Canada, investing $40 million in upgrades. The company's CEO, Sam Tabar, stated that the Quebec operation is part of their strategy to deliver purpose-built AI infrastructure at scale. Amidst volatile crypto prices, mining firms are turning to AI data centers for higher revenue streams. Public Bitcoin miners sold over 40% of their BTC holdings in March, signaling economic pressure and the need to diversify revenue streams due to increasing costs. CoinShares report suggested that less profitable miners are shifting to AI and other workloads to stay viable. Cost per Bitcoin is a crucial metric as mining companies struggle to remain profitable post-halving. Public miners facing challenges in revenue are exploring alternative income sources.
news.headline: Bitcoin miner Bit Digital buys $53.2M facility for AI, HPC push. Also invests $40M in Quebec data center for AI operations. Miners diversify due to volatile market, with 40% selling holdings in March. Some shift to AI to stay profitable.

news.summary: In Dallas & Fort Worth, Texas, Mouser Electronics, Inc., a global distributor of electronic components and industrial automation products, has been recognized as the Best New Product Promoter for 2024 by Diotec Semiconductor. Diotec Semiconductor is a prominent manufacturer of diodes, transistors, MOSFETs, and voltage regulators used in automotive, commercial, and industrial applications. Mouser received this award in appreciation of its remarkable achievement in attracting new buyers and expanding product lines.
news.headline: Mouser Electronics named Best New Product Promoter for 2024 by Diotec Semiconductor, for significant buyer growth.

news.summary: A nonprofit organization in San Antonio, Texas, has urged VA Secretary Collins and lawmakers to put a stop to dangerous prescribing habits. On April 17, 2025, it was reported that more than 20 Congress members signed a letter expressing worries about "The Make America Healthy Again" Commission. They declined to support the commission due to concerns regarding irresponsible prescribing practices.
news.headline: Grunt Style Foundation opposes Congress overprescribing psychotropic medications to Americans, 20 members complained.

news.summary: The Data Masking Software Market continues to show strong demand across various sectors, with a sustainable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 13.72%. Recently analyzed by QKS Group, a leading market intelligence and advisory firm based in Middleton, Massachusetts, the global market highlights the enduring trend. The analysis, released on April 17, 2025, indicates a significant interest in data masking solutions, reflecting the need for enhanced data security practices.
news.headline: Global Data Masking Software Market to grow at 13.72% CAGR through 2030, reflecting enduring demand.

news.summary: An inventor from Columbus, Ohio, recently introduced a new product called THE WALK ABOUT LADDER in Pittsburgh on April 17, 2025. The inventor aimed to enhance safety and convenience for workers by creating a ladder and scaffold combination. This innovative design eliminates the necessity of acquiring and transporting separate equipment for different tasks. The product is expected to revolutionize the industry by providing a versatile solution for workers, reducing costs and improving efficiency.
news.headline: Inventor from Columbus creates Walk About Ladder (CLM-691) for safety. Combines ladder & scaffold.

news.summary: Bitcoin investors are experiencing significant pressure due to record levels of unrealized losses, particularly affecting new market participants. Despite Bitcoin's price resilience, there has been a slowdown in capital inflows and decreased liquidity in the digital asset landscape. This strain is attributed to various factors such as global macroeconomic volatility, liquidity contraction, and subdued capital inflows, intensifying stress in the crypto market. While long-term holders are generally profitable, newer participants who entered the market during recent highs are facing the bulk of unrealized losses. The global macroeconomic situation, marked by heightened geopolitical uncertainty and trade realignment under the previous US administration, has led to increased U.S. Treasury yields, with the 10-year yield reaching 4.5%. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin investors facing pressure due to biggest unrealized losses on record, primarily affecting new participants. Global volatility, liquidity tightening contribute to stress in crypto market. Veteran holders broadly profitable, while newer participants experience losses. U.S. Treasury yields up to 4.5%.

news.summary: Tata Elxsi, a prominent player in design and technology services, revealed plans to set up a specialized Global Engineering Centre in Bengaluru, India. This center will have a significant focus on SDV platforms, electrification, body and chassis, and cloud-native development. The initiative was announced on April 17, 2025. Tata Elxsi, listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange under the code 500408, aims to enhance its capabilities in these key areas through this strategic move.
news.headline: Tata Elxsi secures €50M deal with leading European Automotive OEM, to establish Global Engineering Centre.

news.summary: Binance, a leading crypto exchange, is aiding various countries in creating crypto regulations and establishing national digital asset reserves. CEO Richard Teng mentioned this shift in global sentiment post the US displaying a positive approach towards cryptocurrencies. He spoke about the US's plans to create a legal framework for digital assets and build a strategic reserve of Bitcoin. This change has led many nations to seek counsel from Binance, with Teng stating they were approached by numerous governments. Countries like Pakistan and Kyrgyzstan have confirmed working with Binance founder Changpeng Zhao on shaping their crypto policies. Despite Binance's recent legal issues in 2023, the demand for regulatory guidance has increased.
news.headline: Binance helps countries draft crypto regulations and build strategic BTC reserves, amidst nations seeking guidance.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in enCore to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained enCore securities from March 28, 2024, to March 2, 2025, and are interested in exploring your options, please contact him for further discussion.
news.headline: Investors of enCore are being urged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP to discuss losses with James Wilson for transactions between March 28, 2024 and March 2, 2025.

news.summary: A new Service Robots Zone has been introduced at the China Import and Export Fair (Canton Fair) in Guangzhou on April 17, 2025. The initiative comes as a response to the increasing global integration of AI, sensor technology, and automation. The move aims to address the rising demand for robotic solutions in various industries. This marks the first time such a zone has been established at the fair, demonstrating a proactive stance towards embracing technological advances.
news.headline: Canton Fair debuts Service Robots Zone in response to AI advances, with growing demand for robotic solutions across sectors.

news.summary: A company based in Waltham, Massachusetts, Trinity Life Sciences, known for its expertise in strategy, insights, and analytics for the life sciences sector, has unveiled an artificial intelligence (AI) algorithm. This algorithm has shown remarkable accuracy in predicting revenue results for more than 90% of drug launches in the United States, surpassing the accuracy of Wall Street analysts' consensus, which was below 60% at the launch time. The launch of Trinity's new AI-powered algorithm was accompanied by the release of their latest white paper as part of the Industry Impact Series, named "Predicting Winners: AI-Powered Portfolio Management," delving into the utilization and significance of this innovative tool.
news.headline: Trinity Life Sciences AI predicts 90% of U.S. drug launches' revenue, outperforming Wall Street analysts.

news.summary: New data from the CDC has unveiled concerning disparities in autism diagnosis rates across regions, emphasizing the necessity for consistent and easily accessible diagnostic methods countrywide. The report comes following the CDC's release of findings on April 17, 2025, indicating a pressing need for standardized approaches.
news.headline: CDC reports 1 in 31 children identified with autism. Cognoa pushes for Canvas Dx coverage expansion to address disparities.

news.summary: The Group has confirmed the payment of a dividend of €2 per share pending approval from the Annual General Meeting scheduled for April 28.
news.headline: Sword Group plans to pay a dividend of €2 per share, pending approval at AGM on April 28.

news.summary: Brunel International N.V. has opted to remove item 15 concerning the proposal to adjust the remuneration of the Supervisory Board from the agenda for the upcoming Annual General Meeting of Shareholders set for May 15, 2025. Consequently, the remuneration of the Supervisory Board will stay unaltered at this time.
news.headline: Brunel International N.V. withdraws item 15 on remuneration adjustment from AGM agenda on May 15, 2025, Board's pay unchanged.

news.summary: Taking place in Guangzhou, China, from April 15-19, 2025, the first phase of the 137th China Import and Export Fair (Canton Fair) is showcasing various zones including household electrical appliances, consumer electronics, and information technology. Known as one of the largest trade events globally, this edition is expected to attract a significant number of attendees and exhibitors. The Canton Fair is a crucial platform for businesses to showcase their products and foster international trade relations.
news.headline: AI-powered living featured at the 137th Canton Fair in Guangzhou, China from April 15-19, 2025, showcasing household electrical appliances and consumer electronics.

news.summary: In Frisco, Texas, on April 17, 2025, BasePoint, a prominent provider of Partial Hospitalization Programs (PHP) and Intensive Outpatient Programs (IOP) for adolescents and young adults, announced its expansion by inaugurating its fourth in-person clinic. This initiative signifies BasePoint's commitment to catering to a wider demographic, with specialized services tailored to meet the needs of adolescents and young adults seeking mental health support. This expansion marks a significant milestone for the organization, emphasizing its dedication to enhancing access to crucial mental health services in the region.
news.headline: BasePoint opens 4th clinic in Frisco, TX providing mental health care for adolescents and young adults.

news.summary: On Thursday, shares of Eli Lilly surged as the company announced positive results for its diabetes and weight-loss medication, leading to a weight loss of up to 16 pounds among patients. The stock rose by 15%, solidifying Eli Lilly's position as a frontrunner in the weight-loss pill market.
news.headline: Eli Lilly stock surges 15% after weight-loss pill reportedly helps patients lose up to 16 pounds.

news.summary: In Valencia, California, as of April 17, 2025, renowned cruise company Cunard has announced a remarkable promotion called the 'Adventure Awaits Sale'. This exclusive offer includes discounted rates on over 100 voyages scheduled for 2025 and 2026, featuring exciting destinations worldwide. Among the highlighted trips are Alaska cruises with significant savings available for interested travelers.
news.headline: Luxury cruise line Cunard offers 'Adventure Awaits Sale' on 100+ voyages, including Alaska cruises, in 2025 and 2026.

news.summary: A manufacturing facility in Battle Creek has been acknowledged for its initiatives in recruiting and retaining veteran employees. The facility, operated by DENSO Manufacturing Michigan, Inc. (DMMI), located in Battle Creek, was honored for its efforts. DENSO, a prominent mobility supplier, disclosed the news on April 17, 2025, from Southfield, Michigan. The manufacturing location has been praised for its work in this area, highlighting their commitment to attracting and keeping veteran team members.
news.headline: DENSO Manufacturing Michigan, Inc. (DMMI) in Battle Creek named Gold-Level Veteran-Friendly Employer by Michigan Veterans Affairs Agency - April 17, 2025.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 17, 2025, an inventor from Westerville, OH, shared their motivation behind creating a new solution for transporting, preparing, and storing food. The inventor expressed a desire for a more convenient process and highlighted the potential for their design to efficiently deliver essential aid to starving victims during natural disasters. This innovation aims to address the pressing need for improved food distribution methods in critical situations.
news.headline: Inventor from Westerville, OH creates innovative food/beverage packaging idea for disaster relief. (CLM-169)

news.summary: LG Electronics USA and ERI, a top electronic recycling firm, are joining forces on Earth Day to host free e-waste collection events at LG corporate sites nationwide on April 22. ERI, the primary circular electronics recycler in the US, will responsibly collect all unwanted consumer electronics. This initiative aims to promote eco-friendly practices and raise awareness about electronic waste disposal.
news.headline: ERI and LG offer free e-waste recycling events nationwide for Earth Day, collecting unwanted electronics responsibly.
